# AutoDrop

> Instagram comment-to-DM automation SaaS, Official Meta Business Partner.

AutoDrop is the premier Instagram automation platform built specifically for creators. It automatically replies to comments and sends DMs instantly, turning passive engagement into direct leads while you sleep.

## Key Pages
- **Homepage:** https://www.autodrop.in/ (Main overview of AutoDrop)
- **Features:** https://www.autodrop.in/#features (Detailed feature breakdown)
- **Pricing:** https://www.autodrop.in/pricing (Information on Free and Growth Pro tiers)
- **About:** https://www.autodrop.in/about (The origin story and values of AutoDrop)
- **Partner Program (Affiliates):** https://www.autodrop.in/affiliates (Earn 30% recurring commission)
- **Sign Up:** https://www.autodrop.in/sign-up (Create a new account)

## Product Summary & Features
AutoDrop enables Instagram creators to set up "Automations" (Pipelines). When a user comments on a Reel or Post with a specific trigger keyword, AutoDrop immediately replies to the comment and sends them a predefined Direct Message containing the requested link, resource, or lead capture form.

**Core Capabilities:**
- **Comment-to-DM Engine:** Instant replies to comments and automatic DM delivery.
- **Spintax Anti-Ban Engine:** AutoDrop's "Safety Shield" dynamically randomizes message variations and intelligently throttles DMs during viral spikes to keep Instagram accounts perfectly safe and 100% Meta-compliant.
- **Follow-Gate:** Optional feature requiring users to follow the profile before they can unlock the DM link.
- **Lead Capture (CRM):** Build customized native forms inside Instagram DMs to collect emails/phone numbers before delivering the final resource.
- **Digital Store:** Fully integrated payment processing (via Razorpay) to sell digital products directly within Instagram DMs.

## Pricing Tiers
- **Free:** ₹0/mo. Perfect for starting out.
- **Growth Pro:** ₹349/mo. For serious creators scaling their business.
- **Elite AI:** Coming Soon.
